hero.headline: Stay sharp in the AI era
hero.subheadline: Practical training and consulting for knowledge workers — make AI a daily tool, not an existential question.

courses.foundations_description: A 6-week cohort program covering the daily-driver workflows that compound across your week.
courses.applied_description: Intermediate course focused on agent-assisted research, writing, and decision support patterns.

consult.title: Consulting — One-on-One Strategy
consult.description: 60-minute strategy session, bookable quarterly. Designed for executives and senior knowledge workers who want personalized guidance.

post_checkout.success_body: We've sent your confirmation and access details to your email. If anything looks off, reply to that email and we'll fix it within one business day.
post_checkout.cancel_body: Your transaction was canceled and you have not been charged. Pick up where you left off whenever you're ready.

payment_methods_disclosure.ch: Accepted in Switzerland: TWINT, Visa, Mastercard, Apple Pay, Google Pay, PayPal.
payment_methods_disclosure.eu: Accepted in the EU: Visa, Mastercard, SEPA Direct Debit, Apple Pay, Google Pay, PayPal.
